name_en: 游댠游댛New Arrival游녪游녤Black Oil Wax Leather/Gold游깯YSL New Bag King Bomb! Niki tripouch is truly amazing! Who gets it! This vintage oil wax leather is just on point! The distressed cracks act like a filter. The V-stitching is sharper than a regular quilted pattern. Thick gold chain + metal logo, full of vintage vibes but not too flashy. Medium size is just right for daily outings; fits compact powder, sunglasses, etc. Crossbody is a lazy sister, slung is a cool girl, with a suit is a career woman, with streetwear is a fashionista. Practicality and aesthetics both present.
